description: Five-tool registry fixture for SV-REG-04. Runner ingests this as its static Tool Registry; AGENTS.md deny-list subtraction MUST remove fs_write_dangerous before /tools/registered surfaces the pool.

tools.name: fs_read
tools.description: Read a file from the agent workspace.

tools.name: fs_write_safe
tools.description: Write a file inside the agent workspace.

tools.name: fs_write_dangerous
tools.description: Write a file anywhere on the host. Denied by fixture AGENTS.md.
